caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green long-sleeved top featuring a decorative neckline with red floral embroidery and a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her garment. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements changing slightly between frames to reflect her speech. Her posture remains consistent, facing the camera in a medium shot from the waist up. The lighting is steady, and the only movement occurs in her facial animation as she communicates.
